title: Any clarity on the 4 Series
wikitext:
[]: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by boyfrand » Fri Mar 19, 2021 3:15 pm Hi everyone! Does 3.0+1.0 offer any more details on what the heck is going on with all of the 4-Series Evangelions? Do they show up again in the movie after the first ten minutes? Is there any kind of explanation for why some are Mk. and some aren’t? Do they have entry plugs/where do the dummy plugs go? I have so many questions but don’t really expect straightforward answers, or any at all really. Is there any connection to Unit 5 (the only other non humanoid eva)? That’s all I got for now!

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 19, 2021 3:46 pm boyfrand wrote: Do they show up again in the movie after the first ten minutes?

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Mar 19, 2021 4:15 pm I thought the 4-series was already clarified as being angel+Eva fusions, or was that speculation or in background material only?

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Mar 19, 2021 7:00 pm They only show up in the opening scene. They're MP autonomous Evas. As for the Angel/ Eva fusion, I'd say yes.They have lances and angel faces. Based on the images, certainly you can decide for yourself. I think it's cool that they made a portable MP Eva version of the Operation Yashima canon.

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Mar 19, 2021 10:02 pm For the record, the "4-Series" name was just tenative from when we didn't know their name, to prepare for the not-so-unrealistic case of them ending up as a seperate line from the Mark.04 series. The wiki still lists them incorrectly and I would fix that, but I have no idea how wiki forwarding works and I have little intent to break something that one of our backend guy would then have to fix. for the time, a little header will have to do

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Fri Mar 19, 2021 11:14 pm Make a redirect to Evangelion Mark.04?

[]: Re: Any clarity on the 4-Series?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Mar 20, 2021 10:44 pm It redirects from there, that's the exact problem xD
